deferred_criteria.criterion: Run the same resume drill with actual compact/clear only after handoff and manager permission are configured.

A resumed manager records a decision based on durable replay/export/handoff/criteria state, not live chat memory.

reason: Resumed manager inspected durable replay, export, handoff, and criteria state; worker is idle, task is completed, and no nudge is needed.
